summary: The prune segment set divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in optional segment insertion; no segment set behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 256: M	crates/prune/prune/src/segments/set.rs.
The isolated patch only changes `return self.segment(segment)` to a semicolon-terminated statement.
No optional segment insertion, segment collection, or fallback `self` behavior changed.
